archetype: Archetype 6 (Vibrant Play) + Archetype 3 (Pastel & Soft) with Neo-Brutalist Accessibility Contrast

core_principles: Cognitive Clarity: Progressive disclosure, chunked information, and zero overwhelming layouts.
Motor Accessibility: Oversized interactive targets (min 56px), generous spacing, and predictable interactions.
High Contrast Pastels: Soft pastel backgrounds anchored by thick, hard dark borders and deep text colors for WCAG AAA compliance.
Encouraging Emotion: Joyful, calm, and safe environment using gentle bounce animations, floating elements, and a supportive mascot.
design_philosophy.surface_strategy: Tactile Neo-Brutalist / Soft Utility. Mix soft pastel backgrounds with sharp 2px-3px dark borders and solid drop-shadows (e.g., shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0F172A]). This provides extreme visual clarity and boundary definition for users with cognitive or visual impairments.

scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight text-[#0F172A]
scales.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight text-[#0F172A]

typography.accessibility_rules: All text must maintain a minimum 4.5:1 contrast ratio against its background. Prefer 7:1 (WCAG AAA) for body text. Use Deep Navy/Charcoal (#0F172A) on pastel backgrounds. Never use light grey text on white.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento Grid Protocol (Mode A for Landing, Mode B for Dashboard). Ensure generous gaps (gap-6 to gap-8).
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use p-6, p-8, p-12 for containers. Interactive elements must have ample padding to prevent misclicks.
layout_and_spacing.borders_and_shadows: Cards and Buttons: border-2 or border-3 border-[#0F172A] rounded-2xl shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0F172A]. On hover/active: translate-y-[2px] shadow-[2px_2px_0px_#0F172A].

components.buttons: Large touch targets (min-h-[56px] or min-h-[64px]). Full rounded pills (rounded-full) or soft rectangles (rounded-2xl). Always include an icon alongside text for cognitive reinforcement.
components.cards: Solid background colors (from pastel palette), thick dark borders, and offset solid shadows. Content must be left-aligned for reading ease.
components.navigation: Sticky top header with glassmorphism or solid background. Clear, bold text links. Desktop must show links, mobile uses a large, accessible hamburger menu.
components.forms: Inputs must have border-2, rounded-xl, text-lg, and a highly visible focus ring (focus:ring-4 focus:ring-sky_blue focus:outline-none).
components.data_testid: MANDATORY: All interactive elements must have a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-button', data-testid='lesson-card').

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Gentle lift transforms on cards (y: -4). Buttons should have a bounce animation on click (scale: 0.95).
motion_and_interaction.floating_elements: Mascots and decorative elements should have a gentle, slow floating animation (y: [0, -10, 0], transition: 4s ease-in-out infinite).
motion_and_interaction.rewards: Trigger confetti animations (using react-confetti) for achievements and lesson completions.
motion_and_interaction.accessibility: Must respect prefers-reduced-motion CSS media query. Provide a global toggle in Settings to disable all animations and parallax effects.

libraries.effects: react-confetti, @react-three/fiber (for 3D companion/breathing UI if needed, otherwise use framer-motion for 2.5D)

hero_mascot.description: 3D robotic owl companion in soft pastel peach/blue. Use in hero section and dashboard as the floating guide.

learning_landscape.description: Magical 2.5D isometric learning landscape. Use as the background for the Onboarding or Dashboard Progress Map.

breathing_orb.description: Soft glowing gradient orb. Use in the Breathing/Meditation Interface section.

avatars_set.description: Set of 3D animal avatars. Use in the Login/Signup Avatar selection screen.

classroom_kids_1.description: Diverse school children raising hands. Use in Landing page 'About' or 'Community' section.

classroom_kids_2.description: Teacher reading to kids. Use in Landing page features.

pages_instructions.landing: Use the learning_landscape as a background with a translucent white overlay (bg-white/80). Hero text must be massive and dark. Display the floating hero_mascot prominently.
pages_instructions.login_signup: Create a 2-column layout or a centered thick-bordered card. Large input fields. Avatar selection grid using avatars_set.
pages_instructions.onboarding: 4-step progressive wizard. One concept per screen. Massive 'Next' buttons.
pages_instructions.dashboard: Bento grid layout. Top section for Mascot and welcome. Cards for XP, Streaks, and Achievements. Progress bars must be thick (h-6) with rounded-full.
pages_instructions.lesson_page: High contrast text area. Add a prominent 'Read Aloud' button. Content chunking is critical.
pages_instructions.knowledge_graph: Full-screen container for D3.js. Nodes must use the pastel brand colors with dark borders and thick focus rings for accessibility.
pages_instructions.analytics: Use Recharts. Line and Bar charts must use the distinct brand colors (Yellow, Coral, Blue, Mint).
pages_instructions.settings: Large toggle switches for accessibility controls (High Contrast, Reduce Motion, Dyslexia Font).
pages_instructions.breathing_interface: Full screen, dark or deep lavender background. Center the breathing_orb image and use Framer Motion to scale it up/down mapped to a 4-7-8 breathing text prompt.
pages_instructions.404_error: Playful page featuring the hero_mascot looking confused. Large 'Go Home' CTA.
